===Pokémon Pocket Monsters===
[[File:Sabrina PM.png|thumb|200px|Sabrina in Pokémon Pocket Monsters]]
Sabrina appears in ''[[PM012|The Life-or-Death Magic Duel!!]]'', where she challenges {{PPM|Red}} to a magic duel and loses. Later, she signs up for the No. 1 Pokémon contest.
